title: PROTECT GARDEN 86600256 Pepper Dust, 225g - Non-Harming Powder Animal Repellent - Scent Based Repellent Deters Animal Fouling - Garden Deterrant for Animals - Effective Against Birds, Rabbits & More
features: ANIMAL REPELLENT: Non-harming natural pepper based animal repellent powder for protecting your garden
SCENT-BASED: Deters animals from fouling in your garden through scent-based behavioural modifiers
EFFECTIVE AGAINST: Effective against cats, dogs, birds, rabbits and other animals
EASY TO USE: Convenient, ready to use dusting cap for quick and easy application
HOW TO USE: For best results, thoroughly remove animal fouling from the area before treating, and rake over or cover previously fouled in holes or gravel
description: From the manufacturer Protect Garden Pepper Dust 225g Protect Garden Pepper Dust helps to humanely protect your garden by deterring small wildlife from fouling in it, including cats, dogs, rabbits, birds and more, using a pepper-based repellent formula. This powder-based animal repellent has a convenient dusting cap ideal for quick and easy application for when you need to protect your garden from animal fouling.
